ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each test cycle */,
  "num_testsuite" INTEGER /* Number of test suites executed in the cycle */,
  "normalized_rpa" REAL /* Normalized performance index (RPA) for the cycle */,
  "total_failures_in_cycle" INTEGER /* Total number of failures in the cycle */,
  "exec_time" REAL /* Total execution time for the cycle in seconds */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test cycle */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test cycle */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the test cycle was executed */,
  "test_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test manager responsible for the test cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cycles_test_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cycles_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cycle_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of metrics */,
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the test cycle */,
  "optimal_failures_25" INTEGER /* Optimal number of failures at the 25th percentile */,
  "failures_in_25_ordered" INTEGER /* Number of failures in the 25th percentile ordered by severity */,
  "optimal_exec_time_25" REAL /* Optimal execution time at the 25th percentile in seconds */,
  "exec_time_25" REAL /* Execution time at the 25th percentile in seconds */,
  "optimal_failures_50" INTEGER /* Optimal number of failures at the 50th percentile */,
  "failures_in_50_ordered" INTEGER /* Number of failures in the 50th percentile ordered by severity */,
  "optimal_exec_time_50" REAL /* Optimal execution time at the 50th percentile in seconds */,
  "exec_time_50" REAL /* Execution time at the 50th percentile in seconds */,
  "optimal_failures_75" INTEGER /* Optimal number of failures at the 75th percentile */,
  "failures_in_75_ordered" INTEGER /* Number of failures in the 75th percentile ordered by severity */,
  "optimal_exec_time_75" REAL /* Optimal execution time at the 75th percentile in seconds */,
  "exec_time_75" REAL /* Execution time at the 75th percentile in seconds */,
  "avg_response_time" REAL /* Average response time in seconds */,
  "peak_memory_usage" REAL /* Peak memory usage in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cycle_metrics_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES test_cycles ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test suite */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test suite was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test suite was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the test suite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test suite the test case belongs to */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was last modified */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case (e.g., high, low) */,
  "estimated_execution_time" REAL /* Estimated execution time of the test case in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log file */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "log_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the log file */,
  "log_file_size" REAL /* Size of the log file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the log file was uploaded */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the environment was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the environment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, manager, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to (e.g., dev, qa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* ID of the test cycle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test cycle */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test cycle was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the test cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES test_cycles ("cycle_id")
)
